steps.assistant_text: Splat symbol-boundary artifact (same class as gl_func_0006EF08). The C body `(*(int(**)())((char*)a0+0x4))(*(int*)((char*)a0+0x8), a0)` (load fn ptr from a0[1], first arg from a0[2], jalr) was already byte-identical to the target's 10 instructions, but objdiff scored 90% because splat had cut gl_func_0004D084.s at the bare `jr ra` (size 0x28) while the -O2 build emits the jr-ra delay nop as part of the function (0x2C). No _pad.s sidecar here. Fixed by merging the trailing delay nop into gl_func_0004D084.s (0x28->0x2C) so the baseline function symbol matches real -O2 codegen. The true ROM has 2 trailing nops (slot 0x30); the 2nd is supplied by gl_func_0004D0B4's existing leading-pad INCLUDE, so no SUFFIX needed. Verified vs INCLUDE_ASM baseline (refresh-expected-baseline.py): 100.0 + clean-build ROM byte-identical.

metadata.verification: clean-build ROM byte-identical + objdiff fuzzy=100 vs INCLUDE_ASM baseline
